mapper.select: SELECT notification_no AS notificationNo, receiver_id AS receiverId, sender_id AS senderId, notification_type AS notificationType, content, target_type AS targetType, target_no AS targetNo, is_read AS isRead, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS createdAt, DATE_FORMAT(read_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS readAt FROM notification WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} ORDER BY notification_no DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND is_read = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET is_read = 'Y', read_at = NOW() WHERE notification_no = #{notificationNo} AND receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND is_read = 'N'
UPDATE notification SET is_read = 'Y', read_at = NOW() WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND is_read = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification ( receiver_id, sender_id, notification_type, content, target_type, target_no ) SELECT user_id, #{senderId}, 'INQUIRY_ANSWERED', '문의하신 내용에 답변이 등록되었습니다.', 'INQUIRY', inquiry_no FROM inquiry WHERE inquiry_no = #{inquiryNo} ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE notification_no = notification_no

INSERT INTO notification ( receiver_id, sender_id, notification_type, content, target_type, target_no ) SELECT user_id, #{senderId}, #{notificationType}, #{content}, 'REVIEW', review_no FROM review WHERE review_no = #{reviewNo} ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE notification_no = notification_no

INSERT INTO notification ( receiver_id, sender_id, notification_type, content, target_type, target_no ) SELECT reporter_id, #{senderId}, #{notificationType}, #{content}, 'REPORT', report_no FROM report WHERE report_no = #{reportNo} ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE notification_no = notification_no

INSERT INTO notification ( receiver_id, sender_id, notification_type, content, target_type, target_no ) SELECT target_user_id, #{senderId}, 'REPORT_WARNING', '회원님의 콘텐츠가 커뮤니티 규정을 위반한 것으로 확인되어 신고가 승인되었습니다. 이후 지속해서 규정을 위반할 경우, 계정 이용이 제한될 수 있으니 주의해 주시기 바랍니다.', target_type, target_id FROM report WHERE report_no = #{reportNo} AND target_user_id IS NOT NULL AND target_user_id != reporter_id ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE notification_no = notification_no

INSERT INTO notification ( receiver_id, sender_id, notification_type, content, target_type, target_no ) SELECT user_id, #{senderId}, 'INQUIRY_RECEIVED', '새로운 문의가 접수되었습니다.', 'INQUIRY', #{inquiryNo} FROM member WHERE role = 'ADMIN' AND status = 'ACTIVE' ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE notification_no = notification_no

INSERT INTO notification ( receiver_id, sender_id, notification_type, content, target_type, target_no ) SELECT user_id, #{senderId}, 'REPORT_RECEIVED', '새로운 신고가 접수되었습니다.', 'REPORT', #{reportNo} FROM member WHERE role = 'ADMIN' AND status = 'ACTIVE' ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE notification_no = notification_no

INSERT INTO notification ( receiver_id, sender_id, notification_type, content, target_type, target_no ) SELECT c.user_id, r.user_id, 'RESERVATION_REQUESTED', '새로운 예약 요청이 접수되었습니다.', 'RESERVATION', r.res_no FROM reservation r INNER JOIN company c ON c.company_no = r.company_no WHERE r.res_no = #{resNo} AND c.user_id IS NOT NULL AND r.user_id != c.user_id ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE notification_no = notification_no

INSERT INTO notification ( receiver_id, sender_id, notification_type, content, target_type, target_no ) SELECT r.user_id, c.user_id, 'RESERVATION_CONFIRMED', '예약이 확정되었습니다.', 'RESERVATION', r.res_no FROM reservation r INNER JOIN company c ON c.company_no = r.company_no WHERE r.res_no = #{resNo} AND r.user_id IS NOT NULL AND c.user_id IS NOT NULL AND r.user_id != c.user_id ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE notification_no = notification_no

INSERT INTO notification ( receiver_id, sender_id, notification_type, content, target_type, target_no ) SELECT r.user_id, 'adminmerry', 'RESERVATION_CANCELED', CONCAT( COALESCE(p.product_name, '예약'), ' 예약이 취소되었습니다. (', r.use_date, ' ', r.use_time, ')' ), 'RESERVATION', r.res_no FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN product p ON p.product_no = r.product_no WHERE r.res_no = #{resNo} AND r.user_id IS NOT NULL ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE notification_no = notification_no

INSERT INTO notification ( receiver_id, sender_id, notification_type, content, target_type, target_no ) SELECT c.user_id, 'adminmerry', 'RESERVATION_CANCELED', CONCAT( r.user_id, '님의 ', COALESCE(p.product_name, '예약'), ' 예약이 취소되었습니다. (', r.use_date, ' ', r.use_time, ')' ), 'RESERVATION', r.res_no FROM reservation r INNER JOIN company c ON c.company_no = r.company_no LEFT JOIN product p ON p.product_no = r.product_no WHERE r.res_no = #{resNo} AND c.user_id IS NOT NULL AND r.user_id != c.user_id ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE notification_no = notification_no

INSERT INTO notification ( receiver_id, sender_id, notification_type, content, target_type, target_no ) SELECT c.user_id, ip.user_id, 'PRODUCT_INQUIRY_RECEIVED', CONCAT( ip.user_id, '님이 ', COALESCE(p.product_name, '상품'), '에 문의를 등록했습니다.' ), 'PRODUCT_INQUIRY', ip.inquiry_no FROM inquiry_product ip INNER JOIN company c ON c.company_no = ip.company_no LEFT JOIN product p ON p.product_no = ip.product_no WHERE ip.inquiry_no = #{inquiryNo} AND c.user_id IS NOT NULL AND ip.user_id != c.user_id ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE notification_no = notification_no

INSERT INTO notification ( receiver_id, sender_id, notification_type, content, target_type, target_no ) SELECT ip.user_id, ipa.ans_user_id, 'PRODUCT_INQUIRY_ANSWERED', CONCAT( COALESCE(p.product_name, '상품'), ' 문의에 답변이 등록되었습니다.' ), 'PRODUCT_INQUIRY', ip.inquiry_no FROM inquiry_product ip INNER JOIN inquiry_product_answer ipa ON ipa.inquiry_no = ip.inquiry_no LEFT JOIN product p ON p.product_no = ip.product_no WHERE ip.inquiry_no = #{inquiryNo} AND ip.user_id IS NOT NULL AND ip.user_id != ipa.ans_user_id ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE notification_no = notification_no

INSERT INTO notification ( receiver_id, sender_id, notification_type, content, target_type, target_no ) SELECT #{userId}, 'adminmerry', 'COUPON_ISSUED', CONCAT( c.coupon_name, ' 쿠폰이 발급되었습니다.' ), 'COUPON', NULL FROM coupon c WHERE c.coupon_code = #{couponCode} ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE notification_no = notification_no

INSERT INTO notification ( receiver_id, sender_id, notification_type, content, target_type, target_no ) SELECT #{userId}, 'adminmerry', 'GIFTCON_ISSUED', CONCAT( c.coupon_name, ' 기프티콘이 발급되었습니다.' ), 'GIFTCON', #{reviewNo} FROM coupon c WHERE c.coupon_code = #{couponCode} ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE notification_no = notification_no

INSERT INTO notification ( receiver_id, sender_id, notification_type, content, target_type, target_no ) SELECT r.user_id, c.user_id, 'REVIEW_COMMENTED', CONCAT( '작성하신 리뷰 ', COALESCE(CONCAT('[', r.title, ']'), ''), '에 댓글이 등록되었습니다.' ), 'REVIEW', r.review_no FROM comment c INNER JOIN review r ON r.review_no = c.review_no WHERE c.comment_no = #{commentNo} AND c.parent_no IS NULL AND r.user_id IS NOT NULL AND c.user_id != r.user_id ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE notification_no = notification_no

INSERT INTO notification ( receiver_id, sender_id, notification_type, content, target_type, target_no ) SELECT p.user_id, c.user_id, 'POST_COMMENTED', CONCAT( '작성하신 글 ', COALESCE(CONCAT('[', p.title, ']'), ''), '에 댓글이 등록되었습니다.' ), 'POST', p.post_no FROM comment c INNER JOIN community_post p ON p.post_no = c.post_no WHERE c.comment_no = #{commentNo} AND c.parent_no IS NULL AND p.user_id IS NOT NULL AND c.user_id != p.user_id ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE notification_no = notification_no

INSERT INTO notification ( receiver_id, sender_id, notification_type, content, target_type, target_no ) SELECT c.user_id, r.user_id, 'COMPANY_REVIEW_RECEIVED', CONCAT( COALESCE(p.product_name, c.com_name, '업체'), '에 대한 새 리뷰가 등록되었습니다.' ), 'REVIEW', r.review_no FROM review r INNER JOIN company c ON c.company_no = r.company_no LEFT JOIN product p ON p.product_no = r.product_no WHERE r.review_no = #{reviewNo} AND r.approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND r.company_no IS NOT NULL AND r.company_no != 0 AND c.user_id IS NOT NULL AND r.user_id != c.user_id ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE notification_no = notification_no

INSERT INTO notification ( receiver_id, sender_id, notification_type, content, target_type, target_no ) SELECT c.user_id, #{senderId}, 'PARTNER_APPROVED', CONCAT( COALESCE(c.com_name, '업체'), '의 제휴 업체 등록이 승인되었습니다.' ), 'COMPANY', c.company_no FROM company c WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND c.user_id IS NOT NULL ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE notification_no = notification_no

INSERT INTO notification ( receiver_id, sender_id, notification_type, content, target_type, target_no ) SELECT m.user_id, #{senderId}, 'PARTNER_APPLICATION_RECEIVED', CONCAT( COALESCE(c.com_name, '업체'), '의 제휴 등록비 결제가 완료되었습니다. 등록 검토가 필요합니다.' ), 'COMPANY', c.company_no FROM member m INNER JOIN company c ON c.company_no = #{companyNo} WHERE m.role = 'ADMIN' AND m.status = 'ACTIVE' AND c.user_id IS NOT NULL ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE notification_no = notification_no
